metadata.promise: Un voyage extraordinaire au temps des dinosaures où {child_name} découvre que le courage et la curiosité sont les meilleurs outils.
metadata.editorialPositioning: Album premium belge alliant paléontologie, aventure et découverte, dans l'esprit des grandes expéditions scientifiques.

dedication.text_template: Pour {child_name}, une histoire rien que pour toi

page_1.text_template: {child_name} colle le nez au hublot de la station. Dans l'immensité noire scintille une balise orpheline. BLIX dessine des constellations sur son écran-visage et clignote un point d'interrogation doré.

page_2.text_template: Leur vaisseau danse entre les étoiles vers l'astéroïde de cristal. {child_name} caresse les commandes pendant que BLIX murmure des calculs lumineux. Comme des horlogers de l'espace.

page_3.text_template: Sur l'astéroïde glacé, la balise dort sous un géant de cristal. {child_name} pousse de toutes ses forces, mais le bloc refuse de bouger. BLIX observe, ses capteurs clignotant comme des diamants pensifs.

page_4.text_template: BLIX fait naître un plan holographique, précis comme une dentelle bruxelloise. {child_name} comprend d'un coup : ensemble, nous sommes un levier ! Leurs forces s'unissent, le cristal chante et roule.

page_5.text_template: La balise flamboie orange vif et lance son chant vers la Terre. {child_name} et BLIX dansent dans le silence cosmique. Victoire partagée sous les étoiles !

page_6.text_template: De retour à la station, commandante Sera épingle une étoile dorée sur {child_name}. Le soir venu, dans sa couchette douillette, {child_name} caresse l'étoile pendant que BLIX veille, doux gardien des rêves.

summary.text_template: {child_name} a vécu une aventure inoubliable pleine de découvertes.

dedication.text_template: For {child_name}, a story just for you

page_1.text_template: {child_name} presses close to the station's porthole. In the vast darkness twinkles a lonely beacon. BLIX paints constellations on its screen-face and blinks a golden question mark.

page_2.text_template: Their spacecraft dances between stars toward the crystal asteroid. {child_name} caresses the controls while BLIX whispers luminous calculations. Like clockmakers of space.

page_3.text_template: On the icy asteroid, the beacon sleeps beneath a crystal giant. {child_name} pushes with all their strength, but the block refuses to budge. BLIX watches, sensors blinking like thoughtful diamonds.

page_4.text_template: BLIX births a holographic plan, precise as Brussels lace. {child_name} understands instantly: together, we become a lever! Their forces unite, the crystal sings and rolls.

page_5.text_template: The beacon blazes bright orange and sings its song toward Earth. {child_name} and BLIX dance in cosmic silence. Victory shared beneath the stars!

page_6.text_template: Back at the station, Commander Sera pins a golden star on {child_name}. Evening comes, and in their cozy bunk, {child_name} strokes the star while BLIX keeps watch, gentle guardian of dreams.

summary.text_template: {child_name} had an unforgettable adventure full of discoveries.

book.title_template: {child_name} in het Land van de Dinosaurussen

cover.title_template: {child_name} in het Land van de Dinosaurussen

dedication.text_template: Voor {child_name}, een verhaal helemaal voor jou

page_1.text_template: {child_name} drukt zich tegen het patrijspoort van het station. In de eindeloze duisternis flonkert een eenzaam baken. BLIX tekent sterrenbeelden op zijn scherm-gezicht en knippert een gouden vraagteken.

page_2.text_template: Hun ruimteschip danst tussen de sterren naar de kristallen asteroïde. {child_name} streelt de bedieningsknoppen terwijl BLIX lichtgevende berekeningen fluistert. Als uurwerkmakers van de ruimte.

page_3.text_template: Op de ijzige asteroïde slaapt het baken onder een kristallen reus. {child_name} duwt uit alle macht, maar het blok weigert te wijken. BLIX kijkt toe, sensoren knipperend als nadenkende diamanten.

page_4.text_template: BLIX tovert een holografisch plan tevoorschijn, precies als Brusselse kant. {child_name} begrijpt het meteen: samen worden wij een hefboom! Hun krachten verenigen zich, het kristal zingt en rolt weg.

page_5.text_template: Het baken straalt helder oranje en zingt zijn lied naar de Aarde. {child_name} en BLIX dansen in kosmische stilte. Overwinning gedeeld onder de sterren!

page_6.text_template: Terug op het station speldt commandant Sera een gouden ster op {child_name}. Als de avond valt, streelt {child_name} in bed de ster terwijl BLIX waakt, zachte bewaker van dromen.

summary.text_template: {child_name} beleefde een onvergetelijk avontuur vol ontdekkingen.

backCover.text_template: Het avontuur gaat verder voor jou, {child_name}!

style_rules: Premium watercolor technique with precise linework and soft color bleeds
Warm galaxy palette: deep blues, purples, golden oranges, silver metallics
Cinematic composition with dramatic space vistas and intimate character moments
Technical details rendered with Belgian engineering precision
Soft lighting that creates warmth even in the cold of space
visualBible.palette: Deep space blues and purples with warm golden beacon lights, silver metallic robot tones, and soft peachy skin tones
visualBible.lighting: Gentle ambient starlight mixed with warm artificial lighting from station and spacecraft interiors
compositionRules: Each page balances wide space vistas with close character interaction
Use of negative space to convey the vastness of space
Consistent horizon lines and perspective grids for technical accuracy
Foreground character details against stunning space backgrounds

identityRules: Child astronaut: 8-year-old with shoulder-length auburn hair, bright green eyes, olive skin tone
Sleek white spacesuit with royal blue technological trim and clear bubble helmet
Compact build, confident upright posture, approximately 4 feet tall
BLIX robot: knee-height silver metallic body with rounded edges, rectangular blue screen-face
heroBible.characterDesign: 8-year-old child astronaut with shoulder-length auburn hair and bright green eyes, wearing a perfectly fitted white spacesuit with royal blue technological details and clear bubble helmet. Compact confident build, olive skin tone, warm determined smile. BLIX is a knee-height silver robot with rounded edges and expressive rectangular screen-face that displays emotions through blue light patterns and simple symbols.
forbiddenDrift: Child's auburn hair color and green eyes must remain consistent
Spacesuit must always be white with royal blue trim, never other colors
BLIX must remain silver metallic with blue screen-face, consistent knee-height
Child's expression must never show fear or anger, only curiosity and determination
Child's olive skin tone and compact build must stay consistent across all scenes

sceneDefinitions.foreground: Child astronaut and BLIX robot standing together
sceneDefinitions.background: Spectacular star field with distant Earth
must_show: child in white spacesuit with blue trim
sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Premium watercolor illustration of a determined 8-year-old child astronaut with shoulder-length auburn hair and bright green eyes, wearing a pristine white spacesuit with royal blue technological trim, standing confidently beside BLIX, a knee-height silver robot with a glowing rectangular blue screen-face. They stand in the entrance of a sleek space station with Earth visible through the vast starfield. Warm cinematic lighting, Belgian technical precision, soft watercolor wash.
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, words, letters, scary elements, dark atmosphere, aggressive expressions, oversized proportions, inconsistent spacesuit colors

sceneDefinitions.background: Soft nebula clouds in warm colors
sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Serene watercolor vista of deep space with gentle constellation patterns and soft nebula clouds in warm golden and purple hues. Peaceful starfield with ambient lighting creating a sense of wonder and infinite possibility. Premium artistic technique with delicate color washes and precise star placement, Belgian attention to astronomical detail.
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, characters, harsh lighting, busy composition, aggressive colors

sceneDefinitions.background: Space vista with distant blinking beacon
sceneDefinitions.lighting: station interior light contrasting with space darkness
sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Premium watercolor scene of a curious 8-year-old astronaut with auburn hair gazing through a large circular porthole of a sleek space station at the star-filled void where a tiny orange beacon blinks in the distance. BLIX the silver robot stands nearby, its rectangular blue screen displaying a stellar map with a glowing question mark. Warm interior lighting creates golden hour ambiance contrasting with the vast cosmos. Belgian engineering precision in station details.
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, letters, scary space elements, claustrophobic feeling, aggressive robot design, dark threatening atmosphere

sceneDefinitions.lighting: cockpit displays and approaching asteroid light
sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Dynamic watercolor illustration of the child astronaut with green eyes and auburn hair gripping spacecraft controls with determined focus while BLIX displays holographic trajectory calculations on its blue screen-face. Through the cockpit window, an icy blue-white asteroid grows larger against the starfield. The cockpit interior glows with warm technical displays and golden light washes. Perfect teamwork captured in synchronized concentration.
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, panic expressions, collision imagery, messy cockpit, threatening asteroid appearance, fear

sceneDefinitions.lighting: harsh asteroid sunlight creating dramatic shadows
sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Watercolor scene on a crystalline asteroid surface where the determined child astronaut with auburn hair assesses a massive translucent crystal block that traps the orange beacon underneath. BLIX stands nearby with thoughtful blue sensor lights blinking on its screen-face, clearly analyzing the engineering challenge. The asteroid's surface sparkles with ice crystals under harsh space sunlight, creating dramatic chiaroscuro lighting.
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, frustration, anger, dangerous crystal edges, hopeless situation, dark threatening mood

sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Brilliant watercolor moment where BLIX projects a glowing blue holographic engineering diagram showing leverage points while the child astronaut's green eyes light up with understanding. Together they position themselves precisely to move the crystal block, combining the child's determination with BLIX's calculated precision. The hologram illuminates their cooperation with sapphire light against sparkling asteroid crystals, showcasing Belgian engineering excellence.
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, individual solutions, overly complex holograms, mechanical tools, struggle without cooperation

sceneDefinitions.background: Spectacular space vista with Earth receiving signal
sceneDefinitions.lighting: brilliant orange beacon light radiating outward
must_show: child and BLIX in celebration gesture
sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Triumphant watercolor climax scene of the auburn-haired child astronaut and BLIX celebrating as the beacon blazes brilliant orange behind them, its signal beam shooting across space toward distant Earth. Their joy radiates through the silence of space, with the successfully activated beacon illuminating the crystalline asteroid surface in warm amber light. Perfect moment of shared engineering victory with cinematic composition and golden light washes.
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, subdued emotions, unclear beacon activation, missing celebration, dark atmosphere

sceneDefinitions.foreground: Child in sleeping quarters with badge
sceneDefinitions.background: Station sleeping quarters with Earth view
must_show: child in bunk examining golden badge
sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Tender watercolor diptych showing the child receiving a golden 'Team of the Year' badge from smiling Commander Sera (a kind woman in station uniform) and later that evening, the auburn-haired child in their cozy station bunk, drowsily studying the badge while BLIX keeps gentle watch with soft blue display lights. Earth glows peacefully through the porthole. Perfect bedtime conclusion with warm golden lighting and Belgian attention to domestic details.
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, harsh lighting, fully alert child, missing badge ceremony, impersonal atmosphere

sceneDefinitions.foreground: Child and BLIX as established partners
must_show: child and BLIX as proven team
sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Contemplative watercolor portrait of the auburn-haired child astronaut and BLIX standing together as proven partners in the space station, with Earth and stars visible through large windows. The composition emphasizes their bond through complementary positioning and warm ambient lighting. Belgian artistic precision in depicting the satisfaction of completed collaboration and shared learning.
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, new missions starting, unresolved elements, harsh lighting

must_show: space exploration setting prepared for future
sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Inspiring watercolor vista of the space station orbiting Earth with their small spacecraft docked and ready, suggesting infinite future adventures among the stars. Warm sunrise lighting over Earth's horizon creates golden hour ambiance with sense of hope and endless possibility. The technical precision and beauty of space exploration rendered in premium watercolor technique with Belgian attention to engineering aesthetics and cosmic wonder.
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, characters in scene, final endings, dark or limiting atmosphere, technical clutter

imageGeneration.negativePromptDefault: text, words, letters, numbers, captions, labels, speech bubbles, thought bubbles, scary elements, violence, dark threatening atmosphere, inconsistent character design, amateur art quality, pixelated, blurry

rules: Every story page must advance the quest-with-revelation arc
Page 5 must deliver the emotional climax as specified
Hero and robot design must remain consistent across all scenes
Belgian cultural context must be evident in precision and cooperation themes
No text may appear within generated images
Age-appropriate content for 8-10 year olds throughout

editorialScore.rationale: Strong quest narrative with clear problem-solution arc, Belgian engineering precision, and emotional cooperation theme perfect for bedtime reading.

imageabilityScore.rationale: Excellent visual potential with space settings, clear character designs, and distinct scenes that avoid text-in-image issues.

heroConsistencyScore.rationale: Detailed heroBible with specific physical descriptions and forbidden drift rules ensure character consistency across all scenes.

localeCompletenessScore.rationale: Complete semantic alignment across FR/EN/NL with Belgian cultural context maintained, age-appropriate language throughout.
